title: Duration Conversion Calculator
prompt_md:
## Goal
Read a number of microseconds and convert it to milliseconds and seconds using `std::chrono` duration types and `std::chrono::duration_cast`.

## Input
- A single integer on one line: a count of microseconds (0 <= value, fits in a 64-bit integer).

## Output
Exactly three lines:
```
<N> us
<M> ms
<S> s
```
Where `<N>` is the original microsecond value, `<M>` is the value truncated to whole milliseconds, and `<S>` is the value truncated to whole seconds.

## Constraint
Do the unit conversions with `std::chrono` duration types and `std::chrono::duration_cast` (which truncates toward zero), not with manual division by 1000.

title: Time Difference from Timestamps
prompt_md:
## Goal
Compute elapsed time between two timestamps using `std::chrono` duration arithmetic. Read a start and end time (in milliseconds), find the difference, and report it in milliseconds, microseconds, and whole seconds.

## Input
- Line 1: an integer start time in milliseconds.
- Line 2: an integer end time in milliseconds (always >= the start time).

## Output
Exactly three lines:
```
Elapsed: <D> ms
Elapsed: <U> us
Elapsed: <S> s
```
Where `<D>` is the difference in milliseconds, `<U>` is that same difference expressed in microseconds, and `<S>` is the difference truncated to whole seconds.

## Constraint
Build `std::chrono::milliseconds` durations from the inputs and subtract them to get the elapsed duration. Obtain microseconds via an implicit conversion (finer precision needs no cast) and seconds via `std::chrono::duration_cast` (coarser precision requires the cast). Do not compute the conversions by hand.

test_cases.label: Sample -- 1000 to 4500 ms
test_cases.expected_stdout:
Elapsed: 3500 ms
Elapsed: 3500000 us
Elapsed: 3 s

test_cases.label: Hidden -- 0 to 750 ms (less than 1 second)
test_cases.expected_stdout:
Elapsed: 750 ms
Elapsed: 750000 us
Elapsed: 0 s

test_cases.label: Hidden -- same start and end
test_cases.expected_stdout:
Elapsed: 0 ms
Elapsed: 0 us
Elapsed: 0 s

test_cases.label: Hidden -- large span, 12 to 9012 ms
test_cases.expected_stdout:
Elapsed: 9000 ms
Elapsed: 9000000 us
Elapsed: 9 s
